allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem supabase/migrations | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; "seed.sql existe: $\(Test-Path supabase/seed.sql\)"; "config.toml existe: $\(Test-Path supabase/config.toml\)")

PowerShell($out = npx --yes supabase projects list 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "AUTENTICADO: sesion CLI activa \($\(\(@\($out\)\).Count\) lineas de salida, no mostradas\)" } else { "NO AUTENTICADO: se requiere login" })
PowerShell("n","n" | npx --yes supabase init; "---"; "config.toml existe: $\(Test-Path supabase/config.toml\)"; Get-ChildItem supabase/migrations | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($out = npx --yes supabase gen types typescript --linked 2>$null | Out-String; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and $out.Trim\(\).Length -gt 100\) { [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('C:\\Proyectos\\Naturelly\\src\\types\\database.ts', $out.Trim\(\) + "`n", [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); "database.ts escrito: $\(\(Get-Item src/types/database.ts\).Length\) bytes" } else { "ERROR generando tipos" })
